_comment: LIVE Go-oracle verdict leg for avalanche-rs M9.15 Task 6: coreth judges Rust-built C-Chain candidate blocks (the honest builder output + 5 adversarial header mutations) over the genesis.json committed beside this corpus.

verdicts.name: bad_coinbase
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: invalid coinbase 0x3333333333333333333333333333333333333333 does not match required blackhole address 0x0100000000000000000000000000000000000000

verdicts.name: missing_cancun_tail
verdicts.error: rlp: input string too short for common.Hash, decoding into (types.Block)(types.extblock)(*types.Header)(customtypes.HeaderSerializable).ParentBeaconRoot

verdicts.name: nonzero_nonce
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: expected nonce to be 0 but got 1: invalid nonce

verdicts.name: wrong_tx_root
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: invalid txs hash 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111 does not match calculated txs hash 0x10b185a556f26c58a3b9ec54fd02f2a2fcf3b7989cee690ed6ee0df053657eb5

verdicts.name: zero_difficulty
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: invalid difficulty: 0
